untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculation of price momentum as Z-score over 10-period lookback and volume percentile thresholds (55th percentile of 30-period MA) which are not available as pre-computed indicators. The allowed indicators do not include custom momentum Z-score or volume percentile ranking functions. Using log_returns as a proxy for momentum and vol_ratio_20 as a volume confirmation, but this is an approximation rather than the exact specification.
translation_notes: Approximated momentum Z-score threshold (0.8 sigma) using log_returns decimal scale; approximated volume confirmation using vol_ratio_20 (volume ratio to 20-period MA) as proxy for '55th percentile' requirement. Signal is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT so both LONG and SHORT entry conditions provided. Exit on reversal (returns crossing zero) and volume confirmation loss.
